issues.description: Condition missing: card text requires 'If you have less Life cards than your opponent' but DSL only checks HasRestingDon. Correct condition should be a comparison of player life totals, not don count.
Trigger type incorrect: 'Activated' implies manual activation ([DON!!] cost), but card text describes a passive conditional effect that should trigger 'OnPlay' or be 'Always' with condition check.
Second effect completely unrelated to card text: 'Trigger' with TrashFromHand→PlaySelf has no basis in official text. This effect should be removed entirely.
Duration should be 'Permanent' (or omitted for permanent effects), not 'EndOfTurn'. Card text states 'gains [Double Attack] and +1000 power' with no turn restriction.

condition.description: You have less Life cards than your opponent
